scripts.build: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app
scripts.build:linux: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-linux
scripts.build:mac: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-mac
scripts.build:win: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-win
scripts.build:win-ci: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-win
scripts.build:unpacked: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-build
scripts.build:unpacked:linux: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-build
scripts.build:unpacked:mac: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-build
scripts.build:unpacked:win: npm run plugin:setup && make -C headlamp app-build
scripts.headlamp:install: npm run headlamp:install:frontend && npm run headlamp:install:app
scripts.headlamp:build: make -C headlamp backend && make -C headlamp frontend
scripts.install:all: concurrently "npm run headlamp:install:frontend" "npm run headlamp:install:app" "npm run plugin:install"
scripts.setup: node scripts/headlamp-submodule.js --reset && npm ci && npm run install:all && npm run headlamp:build:backend
scripts.build:all: npm run headlamp:build && npm run plugin:build
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "PLUGIN,BACKEND,FRONTEND,APP" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run plugin:start" "npm run headlamp:run:backend" "npm run headlamp:run:frontend" "npm run headlamp:run:app"
